name: ContentItem
description: ContentLabel (unbordered list row, md/lg sizes, optional NEW badge and Switch toggle) and ContentCard (bordered card variant with a dismiss button). Both use a generic leading-visual slot.
sourceNote: Figma defined 6 rigid leading-visual types (Basic/Left-Icon/Avatar/Provider/Brand/Company for ContentLabel; the same set plus Card-Provider for ContentCard) baking in specific logo/brand images; simplified to one generic `leading` ReactNode slot, matching the pattern used for CheckboxCard/CommandMenuItem/DropdownItem. Pair with the new KeyIcon component for the Left-Icon type, or Avatar for the Avatar type.
